conversation_metadata.notes: User is not AI-naive, but cannot recover continuity from a deleted prior app.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: What do you want help with today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I deleted the other AI. it used to answer customers for me. can this one do that?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It can help write customer replies, but it may not know what the other app knew. What kind of messages were you answering?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: people ask if I still have stock. sometimes I say yes then later no. I need it not to sound bad.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Okay. Do you want a short reply for when stock is uncertain?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: yes short. not like company. just normal.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Got it. I can make it normal and short. What product are they asking about?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: don't put product. just make the words.
